# NWTXTRecord.Entry.empty

**Case**

The key is mapped to an empty value.

## Declaration

```swift
case empty
```

## Entry Types

- **NWTXTRecord.Entry.none**: The key is not mapped to any value.
- **NWTXTRecord.Entry.string(_:)**: The key is mapped to a string.

items.description: The key is not mapped to any value.
items.name: NWTXTRecord.Entry.none

items.description: The key is mapped to a string.
items.name: NWTXTRecord.Entry.string(_:)
